title_en: Bone Broth: The Secret to Glowing Skin
title_es: Caldo de Huesos: El Secreto para una Piel Radiante
hook_en: Want glowing skin? 🥣 Here's the magic ingredient!
hook_es: ¿Quieres una piel radiante? 🥣 ¡Aquí está el ingrediente mágico!
key_message: Bone broth is packed with collagen, which supports skin elasticity and repair.
visual_elements: Close-up of simmering pot with bones
Before and after shot of skin improvement
Quick pour of vinegar into broth
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Bone Broth — Rich in collagen, glycine, and minerals that support gut lining repair (Tip: Simmer for 12-24 hours to extract maximum collagen — add vinegar to pull more minerals from bones)

title_en: Bone Broth Boost: Gut Health Hero
title_es: Caldo de Huesos: Héroe de la Salud Intestinal
hook_en: Is your gut unhappy? 🥄 Try this ancient remedy!
hook_es: ¿Tu intestino está infeliz? 🥄 ¡Intenta este remedio antiguo!
key_message: Bone broth is rich in glycine and minerals, essential for gut lining repair.
visual_elements: Animated graphic showing gut lining with and without bone broth
Time-lapse of broth simmering for 24 hours
Adding different spices and herbs to broth
Serve broth in a beautiful mug
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Bone Broth — Rich in collagen, glycine, and minerals that support gut lining repair (Tip: Simmer for 12-24 hours to extract maximum collagen — add vinegar to pull more minerals from bones)
